GenAiFunction.description:
Read or deploy full metadata XML definitions via the Salesforce Metadata API. Use for configuration-style metadata that is typically deployed as complete documents.
Use for: - PermissionSet, PermissionSetGroup, Profile (permissions, field access, object access) - Flow, FlowDefinition (automation definitions) - CustomLabel, CustomMetadata (labels, custom metadata types) - ConnectedApp, NamedCredential (integrations) - GenAiPlugin, GenAiFunction (agent configuration)
NOT for: - Code artifacts (ApexClass, ApexTrigger) or schema pieces (CustomField, CustomObject, ValidationRule) — use CallToolingApi which supports granular CRUD. - Reading records (opportunities, accounts) — use QueryRecordsWithSoql. - Creating/updating records — use CallRestApi.
If the action errors with "unsupported metadata type", use SearchWeb to confirm which API (Metadata vs Tooling) supports that type and retry with the correct action.
